column2: (SELECT arrayStringConcat(groupArray(toString(w)),',') FROM (SELECT percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY x) w FROM (SELECT 1 AS x UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3)))
column3: (SELECT string_agg(w::VARCHAR,',') FROM (SELECT percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY x) w FROM (SELECT 1 AS x UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3)))
